latest_items.title: Hantavirus cluster linked to cruise ship travel, Multi-country
latest_items.snippet: As of 8 May, WHO reports eight cases, including three deaths. Six cases are laboratory-confirmed hantavirus infections, all identified as Andes virus. Global risk low; risk for passengers and crew on the ship moderate.

latest_items.title: WHO’s response to hantavirus cases linked to a cruise ship
latest_items.snippet: WHO reports eight cases, three deaths, five confirmed as hantavirus at the time of the media note, and identifies the virus involved as Andes virus.

latest_items.title: All passengers on hantavirus-hit ship considered high-risk contacts, EU health agency says
latest_items.snippet: Reuters reports that all passengers aboard MV Hondius are treated as high-risk contacts as a precaution, with eight ill, three deaths, six confirmed and two suspected.

latest_items.title: SNS sources are low confidence and filtered for hantavirus terms
latest_items.snippet: Bluesky, Mastodon RSS, Reddit RSS and optional X recent search are used. Items are shown only when they contain hantavirus-related terms.

academic_items.title: Hantavirus: What you need to know
academic_items.abstract: BMJ news/explainer article about the hantavirus outbreak linked to MV Hondius and the clinical/public health background.

academic_items.title: A dangerous experiment is playing out on a cruise ship with hantavirus
academic_items.abstract: Science journalism article on MV Hondius, Andes virus, person-to-person transmission uncertainty, and outbreak investigation issues.

academic_items.title: More details emerge on hantavirus patients on cruise ship
academic_items.abstract: CIDRAP update summarizing case details, Andes virus confirmation, and public health response.

notes: v6: WHO DON600 data seeded; only hantavirus-related media/SNS and academic/expert news are shown; lists display first 20 with show more.
